3303480.name: Build The Sun
3303480.description:
Explore, Build, Expand, And Build The Sun.

This world is big and mysterious. But thankfully out of the darkness come these little black sprites! House them, feed them, and spend them on harvesting resources, building things and making new settlements!

Playing entirely with the mouse, you will be exploring a generated map to find a nice spot for your first settlement. Collect some basic resources and upgrade this settlement until you need to find new resources, for which you'll have to expand your base to new areas!

But these tiny sprites have big ambitions! They want to light up this dark world, by building the Sun.

Will you help them?
